# CLODEx

> CLODEx is an open-source, local-first Agentic IDE for durable engineering
> tasks. The Free Community source is public; publication of the next verified
> cross-platform Technical Preview is pending.

## Free Community product

The Free Community build keeps the core engineering workflow in one desktop
workspace:

- persistent tasks, searchable history, projects, and restart recovery;
- multiple local workspaces and Git worktrees;
- file editing, Pending Edits, line-level diffs, Git, and pull-request review;
- local terminal sessions, local ports, embedded browser workflows, console
  inspection, screenshots, and visual verification;
- CLODEx account access, bring-your-own provider keys, custom
  OpenAI-compatible endpoints, model selection, and local Ollama;
- user-configured MCP servers using stdio, HTTP/SSE, and OAuth;
- system-browser CLODEx.xyz sign-in bound with state and PKCE S256;
- English and Russian beta interfaces;
- an explicit first-launch allow-or-decline choice for optional product
  statistics.

Direct downloads are paused until a new build from canonical main passes the
Free/managed boundary and packaged-byte verification. The next published
installers must include checksums, SBOMs, validation manifests, and a release
evidence archive. macOS preview packages are not trust-signed or notarized.

SSH runners and remote workspaces are Free-eligible Preview surfaces, not part
of the baseline availability promise. Each build's release notes determine
whether they are included and accepted for testing. Remote capabilities that
depend on CLODEx-operated hosted infrastructure are not included in Free.

## Free and separately operated services

The Free build does not include an entitlement to project-operated managed or
organization services. Any hosted service, external model provider, remote MCP
server, or other third-party integration has separate availability, terms, and
charges. The Free build must remain useful with local tools, BYOK, compatible
endpoints, Ollama, and user-configured MCP without a managed service.

Source-tree experiments and feature-gated surfaces are not part of the current
Free release promise. Their presence in source does not mean that a hosted
service, production adapter, credential, or paid entitlement is bundled with
the Community build.

## Security and privacy

- Repositories and task state are local by default.
- Network access is used only by selected features and services such as model
  providers, account access, remote MCP, browser navigation, or opted-in
  statistics.
- Account and provider credentials use the application's protected storage
  path.
- Permission prompts, Pending Edits, diffs, and Git review surfaces let users
  inspect sensitive actions and changes.
- When optional product statistics are allowed, events may include a
  pseudonymous installation ID, counters, bounded timing, enum values, and
  app/platform metadata. They exclude prompts, messages, source code, commands,
  paths, URLs, credentials, tool arguments, error text, feedback text, session
  recording, and AI tracing.

## Models

The Free build supports CLODEx account access, BYOK, custom OpenAI-compatible
endpoints, and local Ollama. Provider availability, terms, and charges remain
between the user and the selected provider.

## Build and download status

- Current verified Free build: pending
- Planned platforms: macOS Apple Silicon, macOS Intel, Windows x64,
  Debian/Ubuntu x64, and Fedora/RHEL x64
- Status page: https://ide.clodex.xyz/download
- Legacy note: Community Observed 8 predates the enforced Free/managed boundary
  and is not verified against the current Free Product Contract. It is a
  historical tester artifact, not the current recommended Free build.

## Pages

- Homepage: https://ide.clodex.xyz/
- Download: https://ide.clodex.xyz/download
- Source and documentation:
  https://github.com/mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide
- Contact: support@clodex.xyz
